_comment: AgentGuard MCP Gateway config for Cursor. See cursor-config.md for the file path (global vs project) and verification steps. Source: https://cursor.com/docs/context/mcp (verified 2026-05-05). Cursor's ${env:VAR} interpolation is unreliable across versions — prefer the env block, which the gateway reads via AGENTGUARD_API_KEY when the --api-key flag is absent. v0.5 is single-tenant: --tenant-id must be 'local'; multi-tenant routing arrives in v0.6.
